PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLAMOR, ZENAIDA VILLAMOR, BEVERLY AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, LISA LYNN SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-07-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-09-1992 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-08-1992
ASSIGED ARBITRATOR- WILLIAM STURGRON, APPOINTED, ARB. 5- SENT OUT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-16-1993, OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT SIGNED.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLAMOR, ZENAIDA VILLAMOR, BEVERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENO, LISA LYNN $9,550.90 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,550.90, PLTF BEVERLY VILLAMOR RECOVER $1856 FROM DEFT. PLTF ZENAIDA VILLAMOR RECOVER $7694.90 FROM DEFT.
SANCTIN FOR PLT. & D FOR FTF, SCS TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE 2-8-93 10 AM. REFER ARB 1141.11(D)
